key_design_decisions.payload_builder_role: Data preparation & validation - NOT API client
key_design_decisions.category_strategy: Internal normalization first, eBay mapping in Phase 5
key_design_decisions.price_strategy: reference_price is observation only, listing_price decided in Phase 5

data_layers.layer_1: Payload Preparation Record (draft title/desc, normalized category/condition)
data_layers.layer_2: Validated Payload Record (finalized title/desc, readiness judgment)
data_layers.layer_3: Final eBay Payload Input Record (eBay API format JSON)
data_layers.audit: Separate audit trail with full traceability

validation_levels.ready: All required fields confirmed - payload ready for Phase 5
validation_levels.pending_review: Missing optional fields or price not decided - user review needed
validation_levels.rejected: Invalid data or explicitly excluded - skip
